1317411980625313893.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the server, {member}! Enjoy your stay!
1317411980625313893.welcomeDmMessage:
Hey {username}! Welcome to **{server}**!

We're excited to have you join our community. If you have any questions, feel free to ask in the help channel.

Here are a few things to check out:
• Read the rules in the rules channel
• Introduce yourself in the introductions channel
• Get roles in the roles channel
